goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:00' and should depart from 'kings lynn'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 21:00 and should depart from kings lynn
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
